description: Prerequisite tasks Dave needs to complete before certain IRON STATIC pipelines can run. Arc reads this list and uses it to flag blockers. Mark 'done' true when complete.

items.title: Set up Bandcamp artist account
items.notes: bandcamp.com/signup → Artist account. Name: IRON STATIC. URL: ironstaticband.bandcamp.com. Set up Stripe payout. Required before publish-release.yml can post to Bandcamp.

items.title: Add SOUNDCLOUD_CLIENT_ID and SOUNDCLOUD_CLIENT_SECRET to GitHub Secrets
items.notes: Register an app at soundcloud.com/you/apps. Copy client_id and client_secret. Set at github.com/djaboxx/iron-static/settings/secrets/actions. Blocks scripts/post_soundcloud.py.

items.title: Generate YouTube OAuth refresh token (post_youtube.py --auth-setup)
items.notes: Create a project in Google Cloud Console → enable YouTube Data API v3 → create OAuth2 credentials (Desktop app type) → run: python scripts/post_youtube.py --auth-setup. Copy the printed refresh token into YOUTUBE_REFRESH_TOKEN GitHub Secret. Also set YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID and YOUTUBE_CLIENT_SECRET.

items.title: Add PATREON_ACCESS_TOKEN and PATREON_CAMPAIGN_ID to GitHub Secrets
items.notes: Go to patreon.com/portal → Creator Access Token. Get campaign ID from the Patreon API or portal URL. Both go into GitHub Secrets. Blocks scripts/post_patreon.py and publish-release.yml.

items.title: Generate Instagram access token and add to GitHub Secrets
items.notes: Create a Meta Developer app. Add Instagram Basic Display product. Generate a long-lived token. Set INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN and INSTAGRAM_ACCOUNT_ID in GitHub Secrets. Token expires in 60 days — refresh-tokens.yml rotates it monthly.

items.title: Get TikTok developer app approved and add TIKTOK_* secrets
items.notes: Apply at developers.tiktok.com for Content Posting API access. Once approved, get TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN, and TIKTOK_ACCESS_TOKEN. Set all four as GitHub Secrets. TikTok API approval can take days or weeks.

items.title: Create GCS bucket and generate service account key
items.notes: In Google Cloud Console: create a bucket (e.g. iron-static-audio). Create a service account with Storage Object Admin role. Generate a JSON key. Set GCS_BUCKET=<bucket-name> and GCS_SA_KEY=<json-key-content> in GitHub Secrets. Also needed locally in .env. Blocks gcs-sync.yml and audio publishing.

items.title: Set up self-hosted GitHub Actions runner on M3 Mac (for ACE-Step jobs)
items.notes: Go to github.com/djaboxx/iron-static/settings/actions/runners → New self-hosted runner → macOS ARM64. Follow setup steps. Install as a service (./svc.sh install && ./svc.sh start). Required for any workflow job with runs-on: self-hosted. See docs/github-actions-plan.md for full setup commands.

items.title: Set up DistroKid account for Spotify/Apple Music distribution
items.notes: $22/year at distrokid.com. Unlimited releases, 100% royalties. Required before any track can reach Spotify or Apple Music. Not automated — manual upload per release. No API currently needed.

items.title: Record VELA vocal takes and run LoRA training
items.notes: Record vocal takes into instruments/vela/takes/ per the style spec in instruments/vela/. Then run the ACE-Step LoRA training job via The ACE-Step agent. Blocks all VELA vocal generation with her actual voice. Generic voice works without this step.

items.title: Create Slack app and add SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL to GitHub Secrets
items.notes: Go to api.slack.com/apps → Create New App → From scratch → choose your workspace. Under Incoming Webhooks, activate and add a webhook for the channel you want notifications in. Copy the Webhook URL. Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL as a GitHub Secret and add it to .env for local use.
